words.def: equipment designed to serve a specific function
words.zh: n. 裝備, 組織, 計劃, 機構, 調整, 設定

words.def: any maneuver made as part of progress toward a goal
words.zh: n. 步驟, 步, 步幅, 腳步聲, 踏級, 步伐, 短距離, 步態, 手段, 等級

words.def: the option to sell a given stock (or stock index or commodity future) at a given price before a given date
words.zh: vt. 放, 擺, 安置, 移動, 發射, 投擲, 寫上, 表達, 使從事, 使受到, 驅使, 賦予

words.def: a group of things of the same kind that belong together and are so used
words.zh: n. 日落, 同夥, 組合, 集合, 裝置
n. 使用, 習慣, 使用價值, 用法, 使用權
